clientMessage.hidenseek.mod_version_msg: The Hide And Seek Manager current version is: %s
tooltip.hidenseek.whistle.desc: Gives you a lot of Adrenaline Points, but it emits a whistling sound that can be heard from a greater distance, and it also reveals itself through walls for a short period of time.
tooltip.hidenseek.rage_baiter.desc: Gives you Adrenaline Points, but it emits a standard sound, just like when the Revelation Time ends. The sound's distance is also standard.
tooltip.hidenseek.totem_tracker.desc: Track the Game Totem, displaying it through the walls for a short period of time.
tooltip.hidenseek.smoke_bomb.desc: Throw a Smoke Bomb at your feet. The Smoke Bomb grants you True Invisibility (no particles) for a short period of time and creates a dense sphere of smoke that blocks the vision of everyone inside it. After a short time, it dissipates. While Invisible, you don't make footsteps sounds, but you can lose the effect if you take damage. The Smoke Bomb also grants you the Fall Arrest effect for a short period of time. This effect allows you to fall from a greater height without taking damage.
tooltip.hidenseek.zero_gravity.desc: It gives you the Levitation effect for an extended period of time. Levitation makes you fly upwards slowly, like a puff of smoke. After the Levitation ends, you receive the Slow Fall effect, returning safely to the ground.
tooltip.hidenseek.leap_of_faith.desc: It makes you Dash in the direction you are looking. The forward movement is both Horizontal and Vertical.
tooltip.hidenseek.camouflage.desc: It grants you the Invisibility effect for a medium period of time. While Invisible, you don't make footsteps sounds, but you can lose the effect if you take damage.
tooltip.hidenseek.ladder_specialist.desc: This gives you the Ladder Specialist effect for a short period of time. This effect allows you to go up and down stairs more quickly.
tooltip.hidenseek.sound_bait.desc: Allows you to throw a Sound Bait device a long distance. When the device hits the ground, it arms itself, and after a short period of time, it plays a Standard sound, as if a Player were using item 'Rage Baiter'. The throwing distance increases with the time you carry it, just like a Bow.
tooltip.hidenseek.breathing_underwater.d: It gives you the effect of Breathing Underwater. This effect prevents your oxygen from decreasing while you are underwater.
gui.hidenseek.game_totem_head_powered_sc: Click here to start a new Game!
The game could not be started. Please provide an appropriate "Mod Badge"!
----- Top 10 Players with the Most Points -----
gui.hidenseek.game_stage.count.role_suba: Eliminate most of the Hidders to win!
Most must self save to win. Interact on Totem for this!
gui.hidenseek.game_stage.count.camping_w: Camping at the Totem will disqualify you. Step away!
gui.hidenseek.game_stage.progress.sound_: The bait was triggered on %s Blocks of Seeker
